content.html:
In reply to https://hacdias.com/micro/2020/10/is-feed-fixed/.

Relative URLs, eh? Suddenly feels like I’ve had this conversation before. :-) I know they can be an issue (and are discouraged) in RSS feeds, but not that Microsub readers would fail to pick them up as well. I’m using a fork of Aperture, which I’d consider the de facto standard and itself relies on X-Ray to parse HTML (and other) feeds. I sometimes use http://xray.p3k.io to check both h-feeds and individual entries.

Suddenly feels like I’ve had this conversation before. :-) I know they can be an issue (and are discouraged) in RSS feeds, but not that Microsub readers would fail to pick them up as well.
